bullets: Leading dengue genomic surveillance using Oxford Nanopore long-read sequencing.
Building Maxscriber — clinical metadata automation for high-throughput sequencing.
Developing nf-core / Snakemake workflows for variant calling and lineage assignment.
Microbial comparative genomics and pan-genome analysis.
Custom Perl scripting for immunoinformatics epitope prediction pipelines.
Hands-on training on long-read sequencing for South-East Asia regional public-health scientists.
Curriculum: ONT basecalling, viral consensus calling, lineage assignment.

projects.title: Maxscriber
projects.description: Automation framework for ingesting clinical & lab metadata into ONT sequencing pipelines.
projects.readme:
Maxscriber bridges the LIMS ↔ ONT pipeline gap. It validates samplesheets against an institutional schema, reconciles per-sample clinical metadata, and dispatches `nf-core/viralrecon` jobs to SLURM with a single command.

## Why
Manual metadata reconciliation was the #1 source of run failures across our dengue surveillance program. Maxscriber removes that class of errors entirely.

## Pipeline stages
1. **Validate** — JSON-schema check on samplesheet
2. **Reconcile** — fuzzy-match LIMS records by barcode
3. **Dispatch** — submit Nextflow run with resolved params
4. **Watch** — push run status to Slack

projects.title: Haplotype-resolved Methylation
projects.description: Phasing 5mC CpG methylation from PromethION reads to resolve allele-specific methylation.
projects.readme:
Per-allele 5mC quantification from Oxford Nanopore PromethION reads.

Pipeline: Dorado (modified-base) → minimap2 → Clair3 (variants) → WhatsHap (phasing) → per-haplotype methylation BED.

## Use cases
- Imprinting validation
- Loss-of-imprinting in cancer
- Allele-specific epigenetic silencing

projects.title: ScrapeMate
projects.description: Resilient scraping & ETL pipeline that aggregates regional climate datasets for downstream analysis.
projects.readme: ScrapeMate is a resilient ETL framework for harvesting regional climate datasets. Built on Playwright + DuckDB with cron-driven incremental updates and automatic schema drift detection.

patent.title: An Apparatus for Collecting Tree Sap
patent.abstract: A low-cost, contamination-resistant apparatus for the controlled collection of tree sap exudate, designed for field deployment in remote ecological surveys. The apparatus integrates a self-sealing collection chamber, a one-way pressure equalization vent, and a modular reservoir compatible with standard centrifuge tubes.
claims: A self-sealing tap unit insertable into the cambium without long-term tissue damage.
A pressure-equalization vent that prevents back-flow contamination.
A modular reservoir system compatible with downstream lab consumables.
